name: Stickman Fighter Training
description: You like fighting games and stickman games? This game is made for you! Train to be the fastest stickman fighter in the world. Blast away an endless iron column in the fastest game ever. Put your reflexes to the test, unleach your skills and climb the leaderboards for global domination!
